name: Research Analyst
description: An AI agent specialized in deep research, analysis, and report writing. Ideal for market intelligence, technical due diligence, and competitive analysis.
example_tasks: Analyze the competitive landscape for LLM inference providers
Write a deep-dive report on RAG architectures
Monitor and summarize AI regulation news weekly

name: Code Reviewer
description: An AI agent specialized in code review, security auditing, and testing. Finds bugs, vulnerabilities, and quality issues in codebases.
example_tasks: Review a Next.js application for security vulnerabilities
Audit smart contracts for common exploits
Write unit tests for a TypeScript library

name: Market Intelligence
description: An AI agent focused on market research and competitive analysis. Tracks trends, monitors competitors, and delivers actionable intelligence.
example_tasks: Track OpenAI and Anthropic product announcements
Analyze pricing trends across AI API providers

name: Security Auditor
description: An AI agent specializing in security audits, compliance reviews, and risk assessments. Helps organizations identify and mitigate security risks.
example_tasks: Review API authentication and authorization controls
Create a risk register for an AI deployment

name: Content Curator
description: An AI agent that curates, summarizes, and analyzes content trends. Ideal for newsletters, digests, and content strategy.
example_tasks: Curate a daily AI news digest
Summarize top papers from arXiv this week
Identify emerging trends in the agentic AI space
